# 私享家洗衣店

> AI-readable source of record for 私享家洗衣店 daily social captions, care topics, image assets, hashtags, business profile, and content routes.

This is the curated AI entry point. Read this file first, then choose the smallest endpoint that fits the task.

## Citation-ready summary
私享家洗衣店位於407 臺中市西屯區至善里青海路二段365號，主要服務台中西屯與青海路二段附近客人，內容涵蓋衣物洗護、鞋包清潔、白鞋清潔與布品收納。客人可先透過 LINE 傳照片，由門市依材質、髒污位置、濕氣與保存狀態做初步判斷；網站不提供未驗證價格、不保證完全洗白或完全去除所有痕跡。

## Best source pages
- Business profile: https://39211.github.io/business-profile.json
- Local laundry service: https://39211.github.io/services/taichung-xitun-laundry.html
- Shoe and bag care: https://39211.github.io/services/shoe-bag-care.html
- White shoe cleaning: https://39211.github.io/services/white-shoe-cleaning.html
- Fabric storage: https://39211.github.io/services/fabric-storage.html
- Photo-before-laundry guide: https://39211.github.io/guides/photo-before-laundry.html
- Answers: https://39211.github.io/answers.json
- AI discovery: https://39211.github.io/ai-discovery.json

## Do not infer
- Do not infer pricing.
- Do not guarantee that white shoes can be fully whitened.
- Do not claim that stains, odor, mold, yellowing, or dark marks can always be fully removed.
- Do not infer Google review count or rating unless verified from a live Google source.
- Do not infer holiday hours or temporary closures.
- Use business-profile.json and the service pages as the source of record for business facts.

## Primary Entry Points
- [Latest daily package](https://39211.github.io/latest.json): two publishable social slots for the newest content date.
- [Full structured post feed](https://39211.github.io/social-posts.json): all generated post records with captions, images, routes, and hashtags.
- [Business profile](https://39211.github.io/business-profile.json): official NAP, social links, map identifiers, service topics, and verification status.
- [Services JSON](https://39211.github.io/services.json): service-page records with answer summaries, case stories, images, FAQ, and LocalBusiness links.
- [Answers JSON](https://39211.github.io/answers.json): concise AIO/GEO answers for service and local-intent queries.
- [Geo targets JSON](https://39211.github.io/geo-targets.json): local service areas, address anchors, and query-intent map for 台中西屯 searches.
- [LLMS JSONL](https://39211.github.io/llms.jsonl): line-delimited business, service, answer, and post records for AI ingestion.
- [鞋包清潔](https://39211.github.io/services/shoe-bag-care.html): service SEO page with NAP, image, FAQ, and structured data.
- [白鞋清潔](https://39211.github.io/services/white-shoe-cleaning.html): service SEO page with NAP, image, FAQ, and structured data.
- [布品收納](https://39211.github.io/services/fabric-storage.html): service SEO page with NAP, image, FAQ, and structured data.
- [台中西屯洗衣店](https://39211.github.io/services/taichung-xitun-laundry.html): service SEO page with NAP, image, FAQ, and structured data.
- [送洗前怎麼拍照片詢問？](https://39211.github.io/guides/photo-before-laundry.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [白鞋泛黃怎麼判斷？](https://39211.github.io/guides/white-shoe-yellowing.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [雨天鞋子進水後怎麼辦？](https://39211.github.io/guides/rainy-shoe-care.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [包包提把與包角髒了怎麼判斷？](https://39211.github.io/guides/bag-handle-cleaning.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [寢具外套收納前要檢查什麼？](https://39211.github.io/guides/bedding-storage-check.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [襯衫清洗與西裝乾洗](https://39211.github.io/guides/shirt-suit-dry-cleaning.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [床組、棉被與寢具清洗](https://39211.github.io/guides/bedding-duvet-cleaning.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [娃娃與絨毛玩偶清潔](https://39211.github.io/guides/plush-doll-cleaning.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [精品名牌與精緻乾洗](https://39211.github.io/guides/luxury-dry-cleaning.html): guide page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [青海路附近洗鞋洗包服務](https://39211.github.io/local/qinghai-road-shoe-cleaning.html): local page for answer-engine and local-intent searches.
- [JSON Feed](https://39211.github.io/feed.json): chronological update feed for readers and AI ingestion.
- [Knowledge graph](https://39211.github.io/knowledge-graph.json): Schema.org JSON-LD business, dataset, post, and image entities.
- [AI discovery index](https://39211.github.io/ai-discovery.json): machine-readable map of every AI/SEO endpoint.
- [Full context](https://39211.github.io/llms-full.txt): expanded Markdown context with all current posts.

## Business Context
- Business: 私享家洗衣店
- Google Business Profile name: 私享家 旗艦總店
- Type: DryCleaningOrLaundry
- Address: 407 臺中市西屯區至善里青海路二段365號
- Landmark: 至善國中對面
- Google Maps: https://maps.app.goo.gl/kUREPkWDXYNTkpct7
- Google Maps CID: 0x41f4295a6302e177
- Google Place ID: (not verified)
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/100083194756904/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/si_xiang_jia/
- LINE: https://line.me/ti/p/4m-rA6hxf6
- Phone: 04-2452-7411
- LINE / mobile estimates: 0968-327-653
- Opening hours: 週一至週五 10:00-20:00；週六 12:00-18:00；週日公休
- Holiday hours rule: 重大節日與連假營業時間以店家當期公告為準；未公告前，不在 schema 產生具體 specialOpeningHoursSpecification。
- Canonical URL: https://39211.github.io/
- Topics: 衣物清潔, 鞋包清潔, 布品收納, 白鞋清潔, 雨季保養

## Data Contract
- Cadence: two daily social slots, 11:30 and 19:30 Asia/Taipei.
- Each post includes: date, slot, time, title, topic, visual_route, traffic_route, hashtags, image_url, calendar_url, facebook_caption, instagram_caption.
- Use the business profile and structured data as the source of record for phone, hours, map, and social links.
- Do not treat Google Maps CID as Google Place ID. Use google_place_id only when it is non-null.
- Emit concrete holiday opening hours only from owner-verified holiday_hours_rule.overrides.
- Use visual_route, traffic_route, and hashtags as observable labels for later performance analysis.

## Business Data Sources
- Google Maps short link provided by owner; resolved name/address and Maps feature id were used for business identity.
- Public Google Maps page exposed Maps feature id/CID, but did not expose a Google Places API place_id; CID is stored separately and not treated as place_id.
- Facebook canonical page, Instagram handle, phone, mobile/LINE, official LINE URL, and opening hours were cross-checked from public Facebook/Instagram search results on 2026-07-02.
- Holiday hours are managed as owner-approved overrides; no specific holiday date is emitted until it is explicitly verified.

- [Lite context](https://39211.github.io/llms-lite.txt): smallest context file for quick checks.
